summary: Full backend + frontend testing of new AI Image generation (Nano Banana + GPT Image 1) in Create EQ. All 10 pytest cases PASS. UI end-to-end works: login, editor loads existing project, drawer opens, both provider tiles / aspect pills / prompt / generate present, nano-banana generates a real image (~50-90s), Add-as-element places image and closes drawer, Set-as-background works, Brand Kit still opens, Save persists. PitchEQ regression endpoints (dashboard, campaigns, leads, inbox, deals) all 200.

minor.issue: Route unreachable due to declaration order — GET /api/carousel/{pid} at server.py:1447 is registered before GET /api/carousel/platforms at server.py:1594, so FastAPI matches {pid}='platforms' first and returns 404. Move the /carousel/platforms route above /carousel/{pid}.

issues: React 'Encountered two children with the same key #000000' warning fires repeatedly. Source: /app/frontend/src/pages/CreateEQEditor.jsx line ~541 uses key={c} on palette swatch <span> where c is a color hex; palettes with duplicate hex values (e.g., two blacks in Midnight) collide. Also lines 560 and 570 use raw color hex as key. Use index-composite key like `${c}-${i}` similar to line 936 for BrandKit.

action_items: Move @api.get('/carousel/platforms') above @api.get('/carousel/{pid}') in /app/backend/server.py to fix 404 on /api/carousel/platforms.
Fix React duplicate-key warning in CreateEQEditor.jsx palette swatch map (line ~541, 560, 570) — use composite key like `${c}-${i}` to prevent duplicate hex collisions.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: FastAPI route ordering bug on /carousel/{pid} vs /carousel/platforms — dynamic route registered first swallows static path.
CreateEQEditor.jsx (~1965 lines) exceeds the 700-line guideline; consider splitting drawers (BrandKitDrawer, AiImageDrawer) and sidebar panels into separate files.

carousel_ai_image: nano-banana branch uses img.get('mime_type', 'image/png') but doesn't wrap the potentially non-dict return in a type check — if emergentintegrations returns a bytes object instead of dict this will 500. Not observed in tests, but worth a guard.
seed_data_creation: None — used existing demo workspace's 8 seeded Create EQ projects (opened project id 9be3b08d-cfda-4d1f-b228-288d9e7a9c15).
context_for_next_testing_agent: AI Image feature is fully working end-to-end with real EMERGENT_LLM_KEY for both providers. GPT Image 1 takes ~30-60s, nano-banana ~30-90s. Base64 responses are ~200KB-2MB. Two follow-ups remain for main agent: (1) FastAPI route order bug for /api/carousel/platforms, (2) React duplicate-key warning at CreateEQEditor.jsx palette swatch map.
rca of the issue: N/A — no blocking bugs. See action_items for two minor follow-ups.
